name: LOCI QuPath Extensions
description: General-purpose QuPath extensions developed at LOCI, University of Wisconsin-Madison. Analysis, export, and workflow tools for digital pathology.

extensions.name: Deep Learning Pixel Classifier
extensions.description: (Beta) Deep learning pixel classification with embedded Python inference via Appose
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: QP-CAT Cell Analysis Tools
extensions.description: Python-powered clustering, phenotyping, and spatial analysis for multiplexed imaging data
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: QuIET - Image Export Toolkit
extensions.description: Comprehensive image export with overlays, masks, scale bars, and ML training data generation
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Dialog Position Manager
extensions.description: Remembers and restores dialog window positions across sessions, with automatic recovery for off-screen windows
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Wizard Wand
extensions.description: Interactive magic wand tool with adjustable tolerance for region growing annotation
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Polyline Wand
extensions.description: Brush and wand-style editor for line and polyline annotations -- push, smooth, scissors-cut, and erase-from-end modes with two swappable engines (direct vertex push, arc-length displacement field)
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Gated Object Classifier
extensions.description: Apply a saved object classifier to a gated subset of objects, defined by class membership, a measurement threshold, the current selection, or any combination. Each apply records a reusable workflow step.
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Project Metadata Browser
extensions.description: Browse, search, and edit metadata across all images in a QuPath project
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Channel Names Viewer
extensions.description: Always-visible floating legend listing the currently-selected fluorescence channels, color-coded and live-updating as you toggle channels in Brightness/Contrast
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Class Distribution
extensions.description: Live pie charts of annotation class distribution and object-classifier training balance across a QuPath project, with project / current-image / per-image-grid views
extensions.author: Michael Nelson
